'''âl-v-n-z''' ('''kalavnezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaunge|chaunge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaunge|chaunge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-v-n-z
|-
! Lemma
| kalavnezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilavnezoko|thilavnezoko]] || [[word:jilavnezoko|jilavnezoko]] || [[word:shilavnezoko|shilavnezoko]] || [[word:kilavnezoko|kilavnezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholavnezoko|tholavnezoko]] || [[word:jolavnezoko|jolavnezoko]] || [[word:sholavnezoko|sholavnezoko]] || [[word:kolavnezoko|kolavnezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlavnezoko|thĂŠlavnezoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlavnezoko|jĂŠlavnezoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlavnezoko|shĂŠlavnezoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlavnezoko|kĂŠlavnezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
